title: Interest Rate Statistics
summary: This page is a Treasury Department navigation/documentation page describing available yield curve data products including Daily Treasury Par Yield Curve Rates, Par Real Yield Curve Rates, Treasury Bill Rates, and Long-Term Rates. The page does not contain any actual rate data, policy decisions, or analysis—it merely explains where to access the underlying data series.
key_points: Page describes Daily Treasury Par Yield Curve Rates derived from closing market bid prices obtained by the Federal Reserve Bank of New York at approximately 3:30 PM each business day
Daily Treasury Par Real Yield Curve Rates are based on TIPS (Treasury Inflation Protected Securities) and began publication on January 2, 2004
Daily Treasury Long-Term Rates include historical data on the 30-year constant maturity series, which Treasury ceased publishing on February 18, 2002 and resumed on February 9, 2006
Treasury provides Long-Term Real Rate Averages going back to 2000 as a proxy for long-term real rates
The page is a navigation hub linking to data views, not a source of actual rate data or analysis
why_it_matters: This page has no direct market relevance. It is a documentation/index page for Treasury data products, not an actionable source of macro or market information.
